appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: TUI section with isolation boundaries, test repository setup, and assertion testing approach

summary: All 11 assertions for the create-flow-and-main-ui milestone passed validation. The implementation includes: welcome screen with Ctrl+N shortcut, create dialog with focused title input and live branch/path previews, validation blocking invalid submissions, git worktree creation from default branch with collision handling, automatic session creation with worktree linkage, combined tree view with clear hierarchy, selection-driven detail pane with worktree vs session distinction, recoverable error handling, automatic selection repair, and full keyboard navigation support.

testResults.bunTest: 155 pass, 0 fail, 310 expect() calls across 19 files
